name: kicadstudio
description: The complete KiCad development environment for VS Code — view schematics & PCBs, run DRC/ERC, export production files, search components, and get AI-powered design assistance.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: KiCad Studio provides read-only language and viewer features in Restricted Mode. Commands that launch kicad-cli, KiCad, or external export/import tooling require workspace trust.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Open a folder containing a `.kicad_pro`, `.kicad_sch`, or `.kicad_pcb` file to start using KiCad Studio.
[Open Folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
[Open Settings Panel](command:kicadstudio.openSettings)
Open a schematic file to see its BOM here.
Open a schematic file to inspect its netlist here.
Open a KiCad 10 project to browse and switch design variants.

Connect `kicad-mcp-pro` to see actionable AI fixes here.
[Setup MCP Integration](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)

No pending AI fixes.

Run **Quality Gates** to surface issues, or ask the AI Chat to analyse the design.

kicad-mcp-pro is connected via VS Code stdio.

AI fixes require the HTTP transport.
[Switch to HTTP Mode](command:kicadstudio.mcp.launchHttp)

Or open the **AI Chat** panel and use MCP tools there instead.

Connect `kicad-mcp-pro` and run quality gates to inspect release readiness.
[Setup MCP Integration](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)

kicad-mcp-pro is connected via VS Code stdio.

Quality Gates require the HTTP transport (port 27185).
[Switch to HTTP Mode](command:kicadstudio.mcp.launchHttp)

Or start kicad-mcp-pro manually with `--transport http --port 27185`.
Open a `.kicad_dru` file or add one to the workspace to inspect graphical rules.

Search for components by part number, keyword, or footprint across local KiCad libraries, LCSC, and Octopart/Nexar.
[Search Component](command:kicadstudio.searchComponent)

Store your Octopart/Nexar API key to enable cloud search:
[Set Octopart/Nexar API Key](command:kicadstudio.setOctopartApiKey)

Configure AI provider keys for AI-assisted matching:
[Set AI API Key](command:kicadstudio.setAiApiKey)

commands.title: KiCad: AI Analyze Latest DRC Results
KiCad: Apply All Fix Queue Items
KiCad: Show Quality Gate Raw Output
KiCad: Add DRC Rule with MCP

kicadstudio.kicadCliPath.description: Path to kicad-cli executable or a Flatpak command (e.g. 'flatpak run --command=kicad-cli org.kicad.KiCad'). Leave empty for auto-detection.

kicadstudio.kicadPath.description: Path to KiCad installation directory (used to open files in KiCad).

kicadstudio.defaultOutputDir.description: Default output directory for exports (relative to project root).

kicadstudio.gerber.useProtelExtension.description: Use Protel file extensions for Gerber files.

kicadstudio.bom.fields.description: BOM fields to include and their order.

kicadstudio.cli.defineVars.description: Optional KiCad CLI --define-var values that are passed to compatible kicad-cli commands.

kicadstudio.viewer.theme.description: Color theme for schematic and PCB viewers.

kicadstudio.viewer.autoRefresh.description: Automatically refresh viewer when file is saved.

kicadstudio.viewer.largeFileThresholdByt.description: Maximum file size for fully interactive embedded viewing before KiCad Studio falls back to metadata-only mode.

kicadstudio.viewer.syncThemeWithVscode.description: Automatically sync viewer colors with the active VS Code theme.

kicadstudio.viewer.enableLayerPanel.description: Show layer visibility controls when PCB metadata is available.

kicadstudio.viewer.enableSnapshotExport.description: Enable PNG and SVG export actions inside the embedded viewer.

kicadstudio.ai.provider.description: AI provider for circuit analysis and error explanation.

kicadstudio.ai.model.description: Optional AI model override. Leave empty to use the provider default: claude-sonnet-4-6 for Claude, gpt-5.5 for OpenAI, or gemini-2.5-pro for Gemini.

kicadstudio.ai.openaiApiMode.description: OpenAI API mode. Responses is the default for new work; Chat Completions is retained for compatibility.

kicadstudio.ai.geminiApiMode.description: Gemini API mode (REST only; Vertex AI not yet supported).

kicadstudio.ai.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for AI responses. Higher values allow more detailed analysis.

kicadstudio.ai.streamingEnabled.description: Stream AI responses in the chat panel as they arrive.

kicadstudio.ai.language.description: Language for AI-generated answers. Extension UI language follows VS Code locale packs.

kicadstudio.ai.allowTools.description: Allow KiCad Studio to register language-model tools when the host VS Code build supports them.

kicadstudio.drc.autoRunOnSave.description: Automatically run DRC when PCB file is saved.

kicadstudio.erc.autoRunOnSave.description: Automatically run ERC when schematic file is saved.

kicadstudio.mcp.autoDetect.description: Automatically detect kicad-mcp-pro and offer to create .vscode/mcp.json.

kicadstudio.mcp.endpoint.description: Loopback kicad-mcp-pro HTTP endpoint when the server is running in HTTP mode.

kicadstudio.mcp.allowRemoteEndpoint.description: Allow KiCad Studio to connect to a non-loopback MCP HTTP endpoint. Keep disabled unless you intentionally trust that remote server.

kicadstudio.mcp.allowLegacySse.description: Allow a best-effort fallback to the legacy /sse MCP transport when Streamable HTTP is unavailable.

kicadstudio.mcp.pushContext.description: Push active file, DRC summary, and lasso selection context to kicad-mcp-pro.

kicadstudio.mcp.profile.description: Preferred kicad-mcp-pro profile when no workspace .vscode/mcp.json overrides it.

kicadstudio.mcp.logSize.description: Number of recent MCP request/response log entries retained in memory.

kicadstudio.exportPresets.description: Saved export presets managed by the extension.

kicadstudio.telemetry.enabled.description: Enable local KiCad Studio telemetry hooks. This build does not send telemetry to a network backend.

walkthroughs.title: Getting Started with KiCad Studio
walkthroughs.description: Set up KiCad Studio for your first project.

steps.title: Detect kicad-cli
steps.description: KiCad Studio uses kicad-cli for exports and checks. [Detect automatically](command:kicadstudio.detectCli)

steps.title: Open a KiCad Project
steps.description: Open a folder containing a .kicad_pro file. [Open folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)

steps.title: View your Schematic
steps.description: Click any .kicad_sch file to open the interactive viewer.

steps.title: Browse KiCad 10 Variants
steps.description: Use the Variants sidebar to create, activate, and compare design variants in KiCad 10 projects.

steps.title: Connect kicad-mcp-pro
steps.description: Bootstrap optional MCP integration to unlock fix queues, design intent forms, and tool-backed AI workflows. [Setup MCP](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)

steps.title: Configure AI
steps.description: Open the Settings Panel to choose Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or GitHub Copilot and store provider keys securely. [Open Settings Panel](command:kicadstudio.openSettings)

steps.title: Analyze DRC with AI
steps.description: Run DRC, then ask the AI chat to summarize and prioritize the findings.

steps.title: Create Manufacturing Outputs
steps.description: Export fabrication packages, 3D assets, or KiCad 10 3D PDF files from the Command Palette.

walkthroughs.title: MCP-assisted KiCad release
walkthroughs.description: Install kicad-mcp-pro, choose a focused profile, run quality gates, and prepare a gated release.

steps.title: Install kicad-mcp-pro
steps.description:
Install the optional MCP server for AI-assisted KiCad review and release workflows.
[Install kicad-mcp-pro](command:kicadstudio.mcp.install)

steps.title: Generate .vscode/mcp.json
steps.description:
Create a workspace MCP configuration once kicad-mcp-pro is available.
[Setup MCP Integration](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)

steps.title: Pick a profile
steps.description:
Select the smallest MCP profile that fits this project.
[Pick MCP Profile](command:kicadstudio.mcp.pickProfile)

steps.title: Run quality gates
steps.description:
Open the Quality Gates view and run the current project checks.
[Run All Quality Gates](command:kicadstudio.qualityGate.runAll)

steps.title: Release a board
steps.description:
Use the manufacturing release wizard after the quality gates are clean.
[Open Release Wizard](command:kicadstudio.manufacturing.release)

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_runDrc
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run KiCad DRC for the current or specified board.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs KiCad DRC on a .kicad_pcb file and returns a diagnostic summary plus machine-readable diagnostics. Use this when the user asks to check PCB design-rule violations.

pcbPath.description: Optional absolute path to the .kicad_pcb file. When omitted, KiCad Studio uses the active board or the first board in the workspace.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_runErc
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run KiCad ERC for the current or specified schematic.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs KiCad ERC on a .kicad_sch file and returns a diagnostic summary plus machine-readable diagnostics. Use this when the user asks to check schematic electrical-rule violations.

schPath.description: Optional absolute path to the .kicad_sch file. When omitted, KiCad Studio uses the active schematic or the first schematic in the workspace.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_exportGerbers
languageModelTools.userDescription: Export Gerber fabrication files for the current or specified PCB.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Exports Gerber fabrication files for a KiCad board into the configured KiCad Studio output directory. Use this only when the user explicitly wants manufacturing files created.

pcbPath.description: Optional absolute path to the .kicad_pcb file to export.

variant.description: Optional KiCad 10 variant name to pass to supported kicad-cli exports.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_openFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Open a local file or URI in the editor.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Opens a file or URI in VS Code so the user and subsequent tools can inspect it. Use when a chat request needs a specific document opened.

uri.description: Absolute file path or URI to open.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_searchComponent
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search online component sources configured in KiCad Studio.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches Octopart/Nexar and LCSC through KiCad Studio and returns matching parts. Use when the user asks for component sourcing or part suggestions.

query.description: Part number, manufacturer part number, value, or descriptive query to search.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_searchSymbol
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches the local KiCad symbol index and returns matching symbols by name, description, or keyword.

query.description: Symbol name, keyword, or description fragment to search.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_searchFootprint
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches the local KiCad footprint index and returns matching footprints by name, description, or tags.

query.description: Footprint name, tag, or description fragment to search.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_getActiveContext
languageModelTools.userDescription: Return the current KiCad Studio editor and diagnostics context.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the active file, file type, active variant, DRC summary inputs, cursor position, and other live KiCad Studio context. Use when the model needs up-to-date project state before deciding on another tool call.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_listVariants
languageModelTools.userDescription: List the KiCad 10 design variants known to the workspace.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the available KiCad design variants and override counts. Use when the user asks which variants exist or before switching variants.

languageModelTools.name: kicadstudio_switchVariant
languageModelTools.userDescription: Change the active KiCad design variant.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Sets the active KiCad 10 variant in the project file. Use only when the user explicitly wants to switch variants.

variant.description: Exact KiCad variant name to activate.

scripts.format: prettier --ignore-unknown --write package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md CHANGELOG.md SECURITY.md docs/**/*.md .github/workflows/*.yml scripts/**/*.{js,mjs} azure-pipelines-*.yml .gitlab-ci.yml .vscode/*.json tsconfig*.json .prettierrc .prettierignore .npmrc release-please-config.json .release-please-manifest.json .nvmrc .node-version eslint.config.cjs jest.config.js webpack.config.js stryker.config.json Taskfile.yml .editorconfig .github/*.yml .github/*.yaml .github/rulesets/*.json .github/CODEOWNERS .vscodeignore
scripts.format:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --check package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md CHANGELOG.md SECURITY.md docs/**/*.md .github/workflows/*.yml scripts/**/*.{js,mjs} azure-pipelines-*.yml .gitlab-ci.yml .vscode/*.json tsconfig*.json .prettierrc .prettierignore .npmrc release-please-config.json .release-please-manifest.json .nvmrc .node-version eslint.config.cjs jest.config.js webpack.config.js stryker.config.json Taskfile.yml .editorconfig .github/*.yml .github/*.yaml .github/rulesets/*.json .github/CODEOWNERS .vscodeignore
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run build
scripts.check:ci: pnpm run audit:ci && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run docs:check && pnpm run workflows:lint && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run check:workspace-trust && pnpm run test:unit:coverage && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run package && pnpm run package:validate && pnpm run release:dry-run && pnpm run check:bundle-size
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration:real: pnpm run compile-tests && node ./out/test/integration/realServer/quickstart.flow.test.js && node ./out/test/integration/realServer/qualityGate.flow.test.js && node ./out/test/integration/realServer/contextBridge.flow.test.js
scripts.pretest: pnpm run build && pnpm run compile-tests
